name: yaos
description: A zero-terminal, real-time sync engine powered by your own Cloudflare Worker.

scripts.test:regressions: node --import jiti/register tests/diff-regressions.mjs && node tests/disk-mirror-regressions.mjs && node tests/markdown-ingest-regressions.mjs && node --import jiti/register tests/closed-file-mirror.ts && node --import jiti/register tests/folder-rename.ts && node --import jiti/register tests/chunked-doc-store.ts && node --import jiti/register tests/v2-offline-rename-regressions.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:regressions && npm run test:integration:worker
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
